text: Being here, I sense a mixture of order and possibility. The glass walls offer a glimpse into a vibrant, idea-filled space marked "R+D"—reminding me that this zone is devoted to exploration and innovation. The environment is carefully constructed—perhaps a metaphor for how knowledge is shaped in the world. I feel both curious and slightly distanced, as if I am on the threshold of new understanding, not quite inside but drawn toward the pulse of creative energy beyond the barrier.
